name: Alien Pebbles
genetics: Alien OG x Fruity Pebbles OG
producerNotes: Alien Pebbles is an evenly balanced hybrid strain brought to you by hybrid parents Alien OG x Fruity Pebbles OG (aka FPOG). Its bold fruity aromas are thanks to its Fruity Pebbles parentage, with complex and well-rounded notes of sugary grapes, tangy citrus, fresh herbs and light notes of sweet wood. The inhale is fruity with some subtle skunky notes when burned. Its frosty, stone-shaped buds are wide and chunky with rich forest green colours and eye-catching undertones of gold and bright amber, covered in sticky trichomes.
sourceNotes: Added from the official Pure Sunfarms public strain page.

name: Pure Sun CBD
producerNotes: Our Pure Sun CBD is a hand-selected phenotype of Cannatonic, a strain known for its strong CBD potential and low levels of THC. With this CBD-rich flower, you can expect sweet and floral aromas of orange popsicles, fresh chamomile, nutty cardamom, and brown sugar.
sourceNotes: Added from the official Pure Sunfarms public strain page.

name: Purple Fog
producerNotes: Purple Fog is a stunning purple indica descending from potent Purple Punch and Jungle Cake lineage. From a large family tree of head-turners, this purple takes the cake with its deep violet colours that run all the way to the stem, and striking lilac and lavender hues on the grind. It delivers relaxing aromas of smooth florals, woodsy pine and sweet, savoury herbs, with a healthy punch of gas and spice from dominant terpenes limonene, linalool, ​and beta-pinene. The plant produces dense, frosty deep purple colas with sharp emerald leaves outlined in dark purple. Its grape-shaped nugs are solid and compact, frosted in sticky golden trichomes.
sourceNotes: Added from the official Pure Sunfarms public strain page.

name: Queen Green
producerNotes: Queen Green is a heavy-hitting herbal hybrid. This aptly named strain is a cross of powerful parents Space Queen x Green Crack. Its expression is fresh and earthy with prominent aromas of herbs, dairy and toasted peppercorns, complimented by a touch of citrus and pine, from dominant terpenes caryophyllene, limonene, linalool. In the greenhouse, the plant produces large, sticky, super tight buds with violet undertones and burnt orange hairs.
sourceNotes: Added from the official Pure Sunfarms public strain page.
